title: Normalized asset record
description: One observed asset/service produced by the recon engine. Every prober and adapter emits this single versioned shape.

observed_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp; excluded from the deterministic result hash.

target.description: Host the observation is about, e.g. 127.0.0.1

source_file.description: Relative path to the raw evidence for this record.

baseline_class.description: Wildcard baseline comparison result for vhost records.

paths.description: HTTP paths observed behind the genuine vhost.

credentials_found.description: Whether credentials were discovered (values are not stored in the record).
